Cast:- Shanmukh Jaswanth, Mounika Reddy, Chandu JC, Murali Krishna, Padma Venkat, Likitha Tejomurthula, Ravi Shiva Teja, Shiva Prasad, Avinash Varma, Revathinadha, Dhana Balla, Hanumantha Rao.

snippet.title: Roohi - Official Trailer | Rajkummar Janhvi  Varun | Dinesh Vijan | Mrighdeep Lamba | Hardik Mehta
snippet.description:
From the makers of Stree comes another horror comedy. Iss baar mard ko jyada dard hoga!

Roohi is set in a fictional town of North India. The film revolves around two small-town boys Bhaura and Kattanni who are stuck in a forest with Roohi. But there’s an insidious spirit following them with feet turned backwards. What will happen next? Watch the trailer to know more.

Roohi releases in cinemas on 11th March 2021. A Jio Studios Worldwide release. 

Featuring: Rajkummar Rao, Janhvi Kapoor, Varun Sharma
Directed by: Hardik Mehta
Produced by: Dinesh Vijan & Mrighdeep Singh Lamba
Music by: Sachin-Jigar 

Social Media Links 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/maddockfilms/​ 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/MaddockFilms​
Instagram: https://instagram.com/maddockfilms

#RajkummarRao #JanhviKapoor #VarunSharma #Roohi

snippet.title: Mission Valentine | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Trading App at https://bit.ly/Chanchlani_OctaFX and get 5000 USD in your demo account 💵. Start making extra money with the "Best Forex Broker in India 2020" - OctaFX🏆📈

Aa gaya humara naya video
MISSION VALENTINE!
PURA VIDEO END TAK DEKHNA
Warna maza nai aaega
Bahut time baad tum sab seth logo ke lie ek one story video banayi
Haan maalum hai tum sabko laga 3rd part aaega valentine ka 
Lekin dekha humne kaise usko tease kiya video mein😉
Acha sachi bolta hu is video ke peeche 1 mahina lag gaya,from scripting to editing islie itna delay ho gaya video
Maafi seth log.
But maza aa gaya
Ye descrption main aaj subah ke 6 baje hagte hue likh raha hu socho kitni fatt gayi😂
Wo sab chodho ye humara pehla video hai jisme humne first time ek naye aspect ko introduce kiya aur normalize kiya
(Lekin DOKHA paap hai saalo yaad rakhna)
Abhi suno kasam se kehta hu is baar puri ki puri editing maine ki
Is baar video mein puri ki puri ACV team hai
Except Anmol
Except Grishim
Except Muski
Okay lol..
Is video mein kaafi naye chehre bhi dekhne mile honge jinhone bahut amazing performance diya
Introducing ACV team mein Bhavika Motwani as kaam-waali didi
Super talented Vivek Menon (@Watermenon Pictures ) apne beyounick ki team se (teesra hawaldar after kunal & tushar😂)
Aur to aur wo hotel waali ladki jo bhaag gayi Ritika bajaj
Baaki sab purane chawal hai ACV team ke likhte likhte thak jaunga
@Akash Dodeja as mc dost
@Kunal Chhabhria  as lavaris baap
@Simran Dhanwani meri valentine 
Manvita Chhabhria (kunal ki real life biwi aur meri reel life mummy)
@Rohit Sadhwani  as harami manager
@Ritesh Sadhwani  wo paneer-dudh waala 
@Tanish Sirwani  wo dank hotel guest
@Jashan Sirwani  wo hotel waala jo mam ke saath aaya tha
Akash jagtap wo acha desh ka nagrik jo buzurko ki madad karta hai (dont judge a book by its cover)
@Paras Rupani  as bhagoda boyfriend
Animesh Makhija wo nanga dodta hua guest (bhai ki body achi thi toh nanga scene kiya apne liye🙌🏻)
Karan dhanwani rota hua aashiq (dhyaan se dekhna)
Camera @Siddharth Kedare  urf cinderella ne sambhala (shoot khatam hote hi bhaag jaata hai saala)
Lights aur production sirwani brothers ( mere mama ke ladke, aaj kal 50 r lete hai din ka)
Sound handling by ritesh wohi dudh waala
Ladka acha hai but jokes gande maarta hai
Wo hotel couple of wala scene ka idea was idea by Ashi chawla (idea ache deta hai par shooting se darta hai)
Baaki script writing & direction by your chanchu❤️
Seth log agar ye video pasand aayi toh please
Like chodh ke jaana
Mast comment karna favorite scene aur video apne committed (if they exist) as well as single ( matlab sab log😂)
ke saath share karna
Baaki toh tum seth log ko  maalum hai tumhara ashu tum acvians se kitna pyaar karta hai😘
#AshishChanchlani #MissionValentine #Acvians

snippet.title: Radhe Shyam Telugu Glimpse | Prabhas | Pooja Hegde | Radha Krishna Kumar | Justin Prabhakaran
snippet.description:
Radhe Shyam Telugu Movie Glimpse On UV Creations. #RadheShyam 2021 Indian Romantic Drama film ft. Rebel Star Prabhas and Pooja Hegde. Written and directed by Radha Krishna Kumar. Music by Justin Prabhakaran on T-Series, Sound design by Resul Pookutty. Presented by Krishnam Raju under Gopi Krishna Movies and produced by UV Creations and T-Series jointly. The Movie releasing in Telugu, Tamil, Hindi, Kannada and Malayalam.

Glimpse Background Score: Justin Prabhakaran

The epic love tale Radhe Shyam also stars Sachin Khedekar, Priyadarsi Pulikonda, Bhagyashree, Murli Sharma, Kunaal Roy Kapoor, Riddhi Kumar, Sasha Chettri, Sathyan and many others.

#RadheShyamGlimpse #Prabhas #PoojaHegde #RadhaKrishnaKumar #UVCreations #TSeries #Prabhas20 #RadheShyamTeluguGlimpse #RadheShyamTeaser  #RadheShyamTeluguTeaser

snippet.title: Sunitha & Ram With Suma | Singer Sunitha & Ram Veerapaneni Exclusive Interview | Telugu FilmNagar
snippet.description:
Singer Sunitha & Ram Veerapaneni Interview With Anchor Suma. Popular Singer Sunitha Upadrasta and Mango Mass Media CEO Ram Veerapaneni First Ever Interview on Telugu FilmNagar. On this Valentines Day, embrace the special bond watching this exclusive interview hosted by Anchor Suma. #SingerSunitha #RamVeerapaneni #AnchorSuma #SunithaRam #SunithaUpadrasta #SumaKanakala #SunithaRamInterview #ValentinesDaySpecial #TeluguFilmNagar

In the presence of many Tollywood celebrities and well-wishers, Ram Veerapaneni has tied the knot to Singer Sunitha Upadrasta recently. Watch the full interview to learn the most beautiful and interesting facts about the couple.

Singer Sunitha Upadrasta is widely known in South India for super hit songs in Telugu, Tamil and Kannada. In her glorious career started with Ee Velalo Neevu song from Gulabi as playback singer, Sunitha was honoured with many Nandi Awards and Filmfare awards. Apart from singing, Sunitha is also known as a dubbing artist for lending her voice to many star heroines. 

Ram Veerapaneni, the CEO of Mango Mass Media Pvt Ltd and Whacked Out Media Pvt Ltd, is popularly known in the Telugu media and entertainment industry for the last 23 years.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT

snippet.title: CHAKRA - Tamil Sneak Peek | Vishal | Shraddha Srinath | Yuvan Shankar Raja | VFF
snippet.description:
Presenting the Tamil Sneak Peek  of CHAKRA; starring Vishal; Directed by M.S. Anandan; Music Composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

Vishal starrer "Chakra" is an action-thriller movie releasing on 19th February.

MS Anandan's debut film stars Vishal, Shraddha Srinath and Regina Cassandra. 'Chakra' talks about cybercrime and online scams. 

Vishal, as Chandru, is an officer who is on a mission to expose this evil act.

Here's a Tamil sneak peek on the VFF channel that you shouldn't miss! Subscribe to Vishal Film Factory for more updates. 

Chakra movie is coming soon!

snippet.title: Carrom Ki Rani ▶ Ramji Gulati | Jannat Zubair | Mr. Faisu | Official Video
snippet.description:
Saregama Music presents a brand new love song "Carrom Ki Rani" in the voice of "Ramji Gulati" featuring "Jannat Zubair" and  "Mr. Faisu". The song is composed by Ramji Gulati & the lyrics are penned by Moody and Akkhar. 

Audio Credits: 
👑Singer: Ramji Gulati
👑Music: Ramji Gulati
👑Lyrics: MOODY, AKKHAR
👑Arranger: Mr.Hit (UWF Studios)
👑Mixed: United White Flag Studios
👑Mastering: Donal Whelan

👑Video Director: United White Flag
👑Cast: Ramji Gulati - Jannat Zubair - Mr. Faisu
👑Special Appearance: Ayaan Zubair Rahmani
👑Dop : Rahul Arora
👑Editor : Varun Arora
👑VFX : Lucky Tan

👑Production : Akshay Kapoor (Aay Kay Dubai)
👑Poster Designs: F1 Digitals

👑Ramji Gulati - Purple Star Entertainment
👑Mr. Faisu - Qyuki 

👑Special Thanks: Riverland Dubai, Dubai Parks & Resort

Dil Mein Reh Ke Saath Kya Dil Ki Deal Karegi,

Mujhko Paake Tu Lucky Feel Karegi,
Dil Mein Reh Ke Saath Kya Dil Ki Deal Karegi,

Jaise Sapno Mein Dekhi Thi Haan Bilkul Waisi Hai By God Tu,

Carrom Ki Rani Na Chodhta
Tujhe Kese Chordh Du

Teri Photo Laga Rakhi Hai,
Mene Apni Wall Pe,
Baat Karade Mana Lunga,
Tere Ghar Wale Ek Call Pe,

Baat Karade Mana Lunga,
Tere Ghar Wale Ek Call Pe,

Main Kuch Bhi Kar Jaunga Tere Liye,
Ek Baar Bol Tu,

Carrom Ki Rani Ni Chodhta
Tujhe Kese Chordh Du

Mere Sath Rehne Ka,
Ek Bar Iraada Karle Tu,
Tujhe Beach Pasand Hai Baby,
Tujhe Beach Pe Ghar Le Dun,

snippet.title: EXCLUSIVE: Valentine's Day Special - Prajwal Devaraj & Ragini Prajwal Interview With Anushree
snippet.description:
Click to Subscribe:- https://bit.ly/AnushreeAnchor
Presenting the Episode of Valentine's Day special interview with Anchor Anushree ft. Prajwal Devaraj and his valentine Ragini Prajwal

Tune into watching the glimpses of the candid Kannada interview where love is in abundance and questions that spill the beans. Follow the charming love tale of Mr and Mrs Prajwal Devaraj and how they later convinced for Marriage. 

With fun-filled topics and laughter as its pretext, love canopies the show with the Kannada film industries dashing couple, that you'll not want to miss viewing. 

Don't forget to click the subscribe button for watching the whole episode and many more such exciting shows sooner.

snippet.title: 17 Feb | Daily Current Affairs Live Show #475 | India & World | Hindi & English | Kumar Gaurav Sir |
snippet.description:
#Currentaffairs #KumarGauravSir #NTPCImportantQuestions 

17 Feb | Daily Current Affairs Live Show #475 | India & World | Hindi & English | Kumar Gaurav Sir |

𝐂𝐮𝐫𝐫𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐀𝐟𝐟𝐚𝐢𝐫𝐬 𝐁𝐲 𝐔𝐭𝐤𝐚𝐫𝐬𝐡 𝐂𝐥𝐚𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐬
उत्कर्ष क्लासेस के 'करंट अफेयर्स' टेलीग्राम ग्रुप मे आप सभी का हार्दिक स्वागत है!
Telegram Channel: 
1. @UtkarshClasses
2. @Utkarsh_in_English
☟
https://t.me/CurrentAffairsUtkarsh

प्रिय विद्यार्थियों,
प्रत्येक प्रतियोगी परीक्षाओं के लिए दैनिक समसामयिकी (करंट अफेयर्स) की महत्वपूर्ण भूमिका रहती है। इसी को ध्यान में रखकर आपकी तैयारी को और अधिक मजबूती प्रदान करने के लिए  प्रतिदिन प्रातः 6:00  बजे आपके प्यारे कुमार गौरव सर आप से रूबरू होते हैं और चर्चा करते हैं सुर्खियों में बने उन मुद्दों पर, जो कि परीक्षा के दृष्टिकोण को ध्यान में रखकर आपके लिए लेकर आते है। उनके इसी समर्पण भाव को आप सभी ने असीम स्नेह दिया और यह शो भारत का नंबर वन लाइव करंट अफेयर्स शो बन गया। इस नियमित लाइव क्लासेस में आप प्रमुख प्रतियोगी परीक्षाओं के लिए राष्ट्रीय एवं अंतर्राष्ट्रीय समसामयिकी जैसे- खेल, अंतर्राष्ट्रीय संबंध, विज्ञान व तकनीकी, राजव्यवस्था, पर्यावरण इत्यादि से जुड़ी कई जानकारियाँ प्राप्त करते हैं।

इस लाइव सेशन के बेहतरीन फीचर्स इस प्रकार है :
●दैनिक सुर्खियाँ ( #Daily_Current_Affairs )
●प्रेरक वाक्य या Motivational Quote  
●MCQ यानि बहुविकल्पात्मक प्रश्नों के माध्यम से करंट अफेयर्स की तैयारी
●10 सबसे महत्वपूर्ण प्रश्न 
●फूलपत्ती वाला सवाल 
● गुरुमंत्र
●Today's GS Questions
● विज्ञप्तियों से संबंधित जानकारियाँ इत्यादि।

तो जानिए बीते दिन के करंट अफेयर्स Kumar Gaurav Sir के साथ प्रतिदिन सुबह 6:00 बजे ।

Lyrics

Vela shaam da , tu nikhri phire  
ni munda tahniya beh k sikhe tym chakna 
Tere karke ma nikhri phira ve 
ve changa lagge tenu chori takna  
lagga pta ve tu velly akvaunda 
 
Tere agge bolda e bolda e nai , pind raulaya ch pahila naam aunda 

Sukh rakhe baba, tu passnd jatt di
Lala pakki yaari , na pisha hatt di 
Ni mai ghro bahla aam , tera rang aa bdaami 
Mera nature aa shy , dilo bhari bethi haami 
 kahindi naaldi tu yaariya kamaunda  
 
Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai 
pind raulya ch pahila naam aunda 
Gall udni aa pakka tere mere ne yraane 
Akha teriya ne milne de labne bahaane 
Ditte jaane nai jwaab bade uthne swaal 
Rakhe jera je tu vadda ma v turu naal naal 
Kyo na  jassya gulaab tu fdaaunda 

Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai pind rolya ch pahila naam aunda 

Chakni jo teri ve , saroor jya chdaundi 
Dine gora rang , raati yaad aa staundi 
Rakhe galli vich geda , kaato dabb vich laake 
tere karke lyaya  billo bardar to jaake 
munda kava te nishane naio launda 
Tere agge bolda e nai pinda raulya ch pahila naam aunda.

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/GurSidhuInsta​
Facebook : https://facebook.com/gursidhuofficial​
Snapchat: https://snapchat.com/add/igursidhu​
Twitter : https://twitter.com/gursidhuinsta


Lyrics

Vela shaam da , tu nikhri phire  
ni munda tahniya beh k sikhe tym chakna 
Tere karke ma nikhri phira ve 
ve changa lagge tenu chori takna  
lagga pta ve tu velly akvaunda 
 
Tere agge bolda e bolda e nai , pind raulaya ch pahila naam aunda 

Sukh rakhe baba, tu passnd jatt di
Lala pakki yaari , na pisha hatt di 
Ni mai ghro bahla aam , tera rang aa bdaami 
Mera nature aa shy , dilo bhari bethi haami 
 kahindi naaldi tu yaariya kamaunda  
 
Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai 
pind raulya ch pahila naam aunda 
Gall udni aa pakka tere mere ne yraane 
Akha teriya ne milne de labne bahaane 
Ditte jaane nai jwaab bade uthne swaal 
Rakhe jera je tu vadda ma v turu naal naal 
Kyo na  jassya gulaab tu fdaaunda 

Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai pind rolya ch pahila naam aunda 

Chakni jo teri ve , saroor jya chdaundi 
Dine gora rang , raati yaad aa staundi 
Rakhe galli vich geda , kaato dabb vich laake 
tere karke lyaya  billo bardar to jaake 
munda kava te nishane naio launda 
Tere agge bolda e nai pinda raulya ch pahila naam aunda.

snippet.title: Singer Sunitha & Ram Veerapaneni First Ever Interview | Promo | Anchor Suma | Telugu FilmNagar
snippet.description:
Popular Singer Sunitha Upadrasta and Mango Mass Media CEO Ram Veerapaneni First Ever Interview Promo on Telugu FilmNagar. Join us in embracing the special bond on Feb 14th at 3 PM exclusively on Telugu FilmNagar. The TFN Exclusive interview is hosted by Anchor Suma. #SingerSunitha #RamVeerapaneni #AnchorSuma #SunithaRam #SunithaUpadrasta #TeluguFilmNagar

In the presence of many Tollywood celebrities and well-wishers, Ram Veerapaneni has tied the knot to Singer Sunitha Upadrasta recently. Watch the full interview to learn most beautiful and interesting facts about the couple.

Singer Sunitha Upadrasta is widely known in South India for super hit songs in Telugu, Tamil and Kannada. In her glorious career started with Ee Velalo Neevu song from Gulabi as playback singer, Sunitha was honoured with many Nandi Awards and Filmfare awards. Apart from singing, Sunitha is also known as a dubbing artist for lending her voice to many star heroines. 

Ram Veerapaneni, the CEO of Mango Mass Media Pvt Ltd and Whacked Out Media Pvt Ltd, is popularly known in the Telugu media and entertainment industry for the last 23 years. 

Watch Sunitha - Ram Full Interview here:
https://youtu.be/jothgKHiDic

In her glorious career started with Ee Velalo Neevu song from Gulabi as playback singer, Sunitha was honoured with many Nandi Awards and Filmfare awards. Apart from singing, Sunitha is also known as a dubbing artist for lending her voice to many star heroines. 

Ram Veerapaneni, the CEO of Mango Mass Media Pvt Ltd and Whacked Out Media Pvt Ltd, is popularly known in the Telugu media and entertainment industry for the last 23 years.

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1175 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Heer remains unaware while Virat runs behind her car. Will a worn-out Virat meet Heer after his abrasive effort? Watch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode, to know more.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: India vs England Test Series | 2nd Test Ind vs Eng | Post Match Review | #IndvsEng
snippet.description:
India levels the series to make it 1-1 vs the No.1 test side in the world – England. Ravichandran Ashwin performs magic as he does a unique double-A fiver in the 1st innings with the ball and a 100 in the second innings with the bat. Ashwin has performed this amazing feat 3 times in his career and this one would be extra special as it came at his own backyard at Chepaulk. 

India would have been quite disappointed after their 1st test debacle with the bat and ball and they came back strong to prove to the world that they are one of the best teams in Test cricket. Rohit Sharma looked menacingly deadly as he tore apart the English bowling in a turner sort of wicket. His 161 went long yards in making sure the Indians had the upper hand as the pitch deteriorated quite quickly by the beginning of the second day.

England were never in the game after their batting collapse in the 1st innings, the pitch looked like a rank turner and the question that needs to be asked did the wicket and toss play a huge role in India’s victory over England. 

Join us live along with Kris Srikkanth and Anirudha Srikkanth tonight live at 7pm only on youtube. The Test series is a long one and Cheeka and Ani will have a lot to say after the end of the second test. As always if you like what we do then do consider subscribing to our channel.

 
 #IndiaVsEngland #cheekycheeka #Ashwin
tags: india vs england 2nd test day 2 highlights

snippet.title: Sidhi Bus Accident Update: इस बालिका ने अपने भाई के साथ मिलकर कई लोगों को बचा लिया ! | MPTAK
snippet.description:
मध्य प्रदेश के सीधी में मंगलवार सुबह हुए दर्दनाक बस हादसे में 38 से ज्यादा लोगों की मौत हो चुकी है। प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी और मुख्यमंत्री शिवराज सिंह चौहान ने दुर्घटना पर शोक जताते हुए पीड़ितों की हरसंभव मदद का ऐलान किया है। हादसे के ठीक बाद दुर्घटना स्थल पर सबसे पहले पहुंचने वालों में शामिल युवती शिवरानी ने अपने दम पर 2 लोगों की जान बचाई। उसने हादसे के बारे में भी विस्तार से बताया।

क्लिक कर देखें लेटेस्ट TAK फोटो गैलरी: https://www.tak.live/photogallery

मध्य प्रदेश को जानना है तो बस MPतक  ही है सहारा .. मध्य प्रदेश का सर्च इंजिन है MPतक.. 
इसके अलावा छत्तीसगढ़ की भी धड़कन है MPतक .. 
छत्तीसगढ़ की भी हर ख़बर हर जानकारी सिर्फ़ MPतक पर । 
 
 
MPTak …the heartbeat of Madhya Pradesh…updates you withthe latest of all… all information, all news …be it about politics, politician, social issues, financial or geographic matters…we cover a wide spectrum.

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Ep. 1175 | Virat Escapes To Save Heer!
snippet.description:
Akshay finds out about Heer's gender identity but chooses to not expose her. Meanwhile, Virat is sick and keeps calling out for Heer. As a result, he escapes his confinement and rushes to save Heer. But will Virat be able to find her?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26Kt-V0yTlZzY3RFB0Equyf1h

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Barrister Babu | बैरिस्टर बाबू | Episode 198 & 199 | Recap
snippet.description:
An emotional Bondita is relieved after Anirudh explains the meaning of the physical changes taking place within her body. Confused about Sampurna's intentions, Bondita confronts her for lying and misleading her. Will Sampurna accept her mistake and atone for her sins, or will she manipulate Bondita by cooking up a new story?

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first “Barrister Babu” of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/sodhi-poses-as-crorepati-1000108276?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3103: Mission Bhogilal
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Bagha and Jethalal are waiting for Bhide, Sodhi, and his friends to come and take the bag that has money in it which they have bought for Boghilal to trick him with it. As per their planing, Bhogilal will trust and entertain them only if they have got a good amount of money with them. The Bag has 10 Lacs in it, some of them are real and the rest are fake cash. Also, they have decided on a code word to call Jethalal once they complete their mission. Catch the fun and watch the full episode.


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3103: Mission Bhogilal
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Bagha and Jethalal are waiting for Bhide, Sodhi, and his friends to come and take the bag that has money in it which they have bought for Boghilal to trick him with it. As per their planing, Bhogilal will trust and entertain them only if they have got a good amount of money with them. The Bag has 10 Lacs in it, some of them are real and the rest are fake cash. Also, they have decided on a code word to call Jethalal once they complete their mission. Catch the fun and watch the full episode.


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

আজকের এই ভিডিওটা তে সরস্বতী পুজোতে  বিভিন্ন মানুষেরা কি কি করে সেটা মজার ছলে দেখানো হয়েছে। কেউ সরস্বতী পূজার আগে কুল খেয়ে ফেলে। কেউবা সারাবছর পরীক্ষাতে না পড়ে পুজোর দিন পাস করার প্রার্থনায় মগ্ন থাকে। আর হ্যাঁ এই ভিডিওটা শুধু মজার জন্য এই করা। এই ভিডিওটি ধারায় কোন ধর্মীয় অনুষ্ঠান রিতিকে অপমান করা একদমই হয়নি। তবুও যদি কারোর আবেগি আঘাত লেগে থাকে তার জন্য একান্তভাবে ক্ষমাপ্রার্থী। আর হ্যাঁ অবশ্যই কমেন্টস জানাও নেক্সট ভিডিও টি কোন টপিকে বানাবো।

আজকের এই ভিডিওটা তে সরস্বতী পুজোতে  বিভিন্ন মানুষেরা কি কি করে সেটা মজার ছলে দেখানো হয়েছে। কেউ সরস্বতী পূজার আগে কুল খেয়ে ফেলে। কেউবা সারাবছর পরীক্ষাতে না পড়ে পুজোর দিন পাস করার প্রার্থনায় মগ্ন থাকে। আর হ্যাঁ এই ভিডিওটা শুধু মজার জন্য এই করা। এই ভিডিওটি ধারায় কোন ধর্মীয় অনুষ্ঠান রিতিকে অপমান করা একদমই হয়নি। তবুও যদি কারোর আবেগি আঘাত লেগে থাকে তার জন্য একান্তভাবে ক্ষমাপ্রার্থী। আর হ্যাঁ অবশ্যই কমেন্টস জানাও নেক্সট ভিডিও টি কোন টপিকে বানাবো।




Co Actors- Santanu, Saikat (সই), Indranil, Jayanta, Trisha (তিরিং)
Make up & Styling- Debashree (মিঠু)
Camera & Edit - Mainak

snippet.title: 2021 Citroen C5 Aircross review - French revolution? | First Drive | Autocar India
snippet.description:
French carmaker Citroen is driving into India with the C5 Aircross. What’s this new brand and its first model for India all about? Renuka Kirpalani gives the details in her Citroen C5 Aircross review. 

Cameraperson: Anand Malepu
Editor: Mohit Sharma
Video shot on Sony Alpha III. 

0:00 - Introduction
0:10 - Citroen C5 Aircross India

snippet.title: Techniques of Self Motivation : Emotional Intelligence by Dr. Vikas Divyakirti
snippet.description:
प्रिय व्यूअर्स, 

Interesting Moments सीरीज़ की यह वीडियो क्लिप डॉ. विकास दिव्यकीर्ति सर की एथिक्स क्लास की है। हम में से हर किसी के जीवन में ऐसे कठिन वक्त आते ही हैं जब हम खुद को हारा हुआ महसूस करने लगते हैं, किंतु लक्ष्य तक पहुँचने के लिये आवश्यक है कि हम इन परिस्थितियों से उबर कर खुद को सफलता के लिये तैयार करेें। इसलिये हमेशा खुद को प्रेरित करते रहना ज़रूरी है ताकि निराशा का भाव मन में घर न बना पाए। इस वीडियो में सर इसी संदर्भ में चर्चा कर रहे हैं और खुद को मोटिवेट रखने के तरीकों को बता रहे हैं। इन्हें अपनाकर निश्चित ही आप पहले से और अधिक ऊर्जावान व सकारात्मक महसूस करेंगे। यह वीडियो आपको जीवन के प्रति सकारात्मक दृष्टिकोण विकसित करने में भी मददगार होगा। 

बता दें कि Interesting Moments की इस सीरीज़ में हम डॉ. विकास दिव्यकीर्ति की हिंदी साहित्य, एथिक्स और निबंध की क्लासेज़ की छोटी -छोटी वीडियो क्लिप्स साझा कर रहे हैं। इन वीडियोज़ से आप यह सीख पाएंगे कि कैसे कठिन से कठिन बातों को भी आसानी से सीखा जा सकता है। सर के पढ़ाने का रोचक तरीका सहज ही विषय के प्रति रुचि जगा देता है। जब आप इनसे गुजरेंगे तो इस बात को महसूस कर सकेंगे। इसमें मोटिवेशन, हास्य विनोद तथा जीवन से जुड़ी कुछ महत्त्वपूर्ण बातें होती हैं।

#ShortVideos #VikasSir #InterestingMoments

snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Kanyadaan" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Kanyadaan: Synopsis : Kanyadan is a story of a father Anjan Basu - a History teacher and his five daughters. After his wife’s demise, Anjan Basu had always been the guiding light & the support system to his daughters’ life, which paved its way even after they got married. He has always guarded his daughters with all his principles & ideals, through all the complexities of life and lead them with love to get them through and survive. The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.

snippet.title: Ind vs Eng 2021,2nd Test : It Was Amazing To See Mohammed Siraj Celebrating My Century - R Ashwin
snippet.description:
Ind vs Eng 2021,2nd Test : “In the past, he's (Ishant) been with me when I got hundreds at home and once Siraj came, I knew how to approach. I was thrilled for his batting and told him to go through the line of the ball. It was amazing to see how excited he was when I got my hundred. I don't know what the team is feeling like but I am sure they are thrilled. I can't thank the crowd enough, they have been very supportive,” Ashwin said
#IndvsEng2021
#RavichandranAshwin
#MohammedSiraj
#ViratKohli
#IshantSharma
#IndvsEng2ndTest
#RishabhPant
#GautamGambhir
#ChateshwarPujara
#PatCummins
#RohitSharma
#TeamIndia
#KLRahul
#AjinkyaRahane
#WashingtonSundar
#IndvsEng
#JaspritBumrah
#Cricket

సెంచరీ సాధించిన సమయంలో పేసర్ మొహ్మద్ సిరాజ్ సంబరాలు చూసి తాను ఆశ్చర్యపోయానని టీమిండియా సీనియర్ స్పిన్నర్ రవిచంద్రన్ అశ్విన్ తెలిపాడు. చెన్నై చెపాక్ మైదానంలో ఇంగ్లండ్‌తో జరుగుతున్న రెండో టెస్టులో అశ్విన్‌ ఆల్‌రౌండ్‌ షోతో సత్తా చాటుతున్నాడు. తొలి ఇన్నింగ్స్‌లో 5 వికెట్లతో అదరగొట్టిన యాష్.. రెండో ఇన్నింగ్స్‌లో సూపర్‌ సెంచరీ బాదాడు. ప్రస్తుతం అశ్విన్‌పై ప్రశంసల జల్లు కురుస్తోంది. బ్యాటు, బంతితో ఆంగ్లేయులను ఆటాడిస్తున్న అతడిని ఫాన్స్, మాజీలు అభినందనలతో ముంచెత్తుతున్నారు.

snippet.title: 2021 Lockdown Again? | Tamil | Madan Gowri | MG
snippet.description:
Join Special MG Squad: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCY6KjrDBN_tIRFT_QNqQbRQ/join
--------------
In this Madan Gowri video, we will be discussing about Lockdowns. With new variants from South Africa, UK and Brazil is being talked in the news as spreading into India. The big question people have is will there be another lockdown In India. We will be trying to understand the current situation and possible future scenarios in which there could be a lockdown in India.

snippet.title: Harano Sur - Full Episode | 14 Feb 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Harano Sur" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Harano Sur: Shashanka Shekhar, the music maestro, is spellbound by Ahana’s singing and wants to get her married to his son Nakshatra. He is inclined towards popular music over classical & is more renowned than his father. He is against marrying a singer. Coincidentally, he also meets Ahana & she appears to be someone who doesn’t care about his celebrity status or lavish lifestyle. He gets married to Ahana, without knowing about her singing abilities. What will happen when Nakshatra gets to know about Ahana’s singing abilities? Will music cause divide between them?

SUBSCRIBE to Sun Bangla YouTube channel - http://bit.ly/2kviBbJ

snippet.title: कोण होती पूजा चव्हाण? Who was Pooja Chavan? Maharashtra Minister | Maharashtra News | Sanjay Rathod
snippet.description:
पूजा चव्हाण ही बीड जिल्ह्यातील परळीची रहिवाशी होती. पुजा सामाजिक आणि राजकीय कार्यक्रमात नेहमीच पुढे असायची. काही फोटोंमध्ये ती माजी मंत्री पंकजा मुंडे, खासदार प्रितम मुंडे यांच्यासोबत कार्यक्रमांमध्ये आणि प्रचारातही सोबत दिसत असायची. शिवसेनेचे यवतमाळमधील मंत्री संजय राठोड यांच्यासोबतचे तिचे काही फोटोसुद्धा सोशल मिडीयावर पोस्ट केलेले आहेत. तसेच त्यांच्या समर्थनार्थ तिने काही फेसबुक पोस्टसुद्धा केलेल्या आहेत. पुजा ही बंजारा समाजाची होती आणि ती समाजाच्या कार्यक्रमांमध्ये सहभागी असायची.

#Lokmat #Sanjayrathod #Poojachavan #Pankajamunde #Mahavikasaghadi #Pritammunde 
Subscribe to Our Channel 👉🏻

localized.title: कोण होती पूजा चव्हाण? Who was Pooja Chavan? Maharashtra Minister | Maharashtra News | Sanjay Rathod
localized.description:
पूजा चव्हाण ही बीड जिल्ह्यातील परळीची रहिवाशी होती. पुजा सामाजिक आणि राजकीय कार्यक्रमात नेहमीच पुढे असायची. काही फोटोंमध्ये ती माजी मंत्री पंकजा मुंडे, खासदार प्रितम मुंडे यांच्यासोबत कार्यक्रमांमध्ये आणि प्रचारातही सोबत दिसत असायची. शिवसेनेचे यवतमाळमधील मंत्री संजय राठोड यांच्यासोबतचे तिचे काही फोटोसुद्धा सोशल मिडीयावर पोस्ट केलेले आहेत. तसेच त्यांच्या समर्थनार्थ तिने काही फेसबुक पोस्टसुद्धा केलेल्या आहेत. पुजा ही बंजारा समाजाची होती आणि ती समाजाच्या कार्यक्रमांमध्ये सहभागी असायची.

snippet.title: Thar 2021 Delivery - My Uncle’s first car - Irfan's View
snippet.description:
#Thar2021 #NewCar #IrfansView

This car is 2021 model and it was booked by my uncle in the month of December 2020. He got it delivered this month. We were eagerly waiting for this to deliver and finally we did it.  I've made video on its whole features and you guys really enjoyed it, my uncle too. So he finally bought this car and I am that this is his first car. This car has an amazing performance and has a great features.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

Credits:
Directed by S. S. Surya
Produced by T.Sivakumar
Starring: Vikram Prabhu, Nikki Galrani, Bindhu Madhavi
Music by C. Sathya
Cinematography: S. Saravanan
Edited by G. Sasikumar

Synopsis
Movie starts with ‘Dhoni’ Kumar (Vikram Prabhu) trying to save a heart-broken Nadhiya (Bindu Madhavi) from committing suicide. Nadhiya narrates her poignant tale to Kumar, who actually resembles Paandi (Vikram Prabhu in another role), her lover. After listening to the partly-convincing love story between them, Kumar assures to help her find Paandi. Meanwhile, Nadhiya finds that Kumar, too, is a heart-broken person. Upon her compulsion, Kumar, a self-confessed fan of Mahendra Singh Dhoni, opens up his love story with Radha (Nikki Galrani), who is a huge fan of Rajinikanth. Will Nadhiya, who has been abandoned by her family for falling in love with Paandi, be able to find him? Will Kumar be able to live his life happily thereafter?
 

For more such movies
► Subscribe our channel : http://bit.ly/PrimetimeActionMovies

Credits:
Directed by S. S. Surya
Produced by T.Sivakumar
Starring: Vikram Prabhu, Nikki Galrani, Bindhu Madhavi
Music by C. Sathya
Cinematography: S. Saravanan
Edited by G. Sasikumar

Synopsis
Movie starts with ‘Dhoni’ Kumar (Vikram Prabhu) trying to save a heart-broken Nadhiya (Bindu Madhavi) from committing suicide. Nadhiya narrates her poignant tale to Kumar, who actually resembles Paandi (Vikram Prabhu in another role), her lover. After listening to the partly-convincing love story between them, Kumar assures to help her find Paandi. Meanwhile, Nadhiya finds that Kumar, too, is a heart-broken person. Upon her compulsion, Kumar, a self-confessed fan of Mahendra Singh Dhoni, opens up his love story with Radha (Nikki Galrani), who is a huge fan of Rajinikanth. Will Nadhiya, who has been abandoned by her family for falling in love with Paandi, be able to find him? Will Kumar be able to live his life happily thereafter?
